task_completion.description: The 'Attention Is All You Need' paper is selected in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window (middle pane), the row for the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' is highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: The first author's first name for 'Attention Is All You Need' is updated to 'Ashish'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane (Info tab), the first name field for the first author of 'Attention Is All You Need' displays 'Ashish'.

task_completion.description: The 'Deep Learning' paper is selected in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window (middle pane), the row for the paper 'Deep Learning' is highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: The first author's name for 'Deep Learning' is updated to 'Yann' (first name) and 'LeCun' (last name).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane (Info tab), the first author of 'Deep Learning' displays 'Yann' in the first name field and 'LeCun' in the last name field.

task_completion.description: The 'Generative Adversarial Nets' paper is selected in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main window (middle pane), the row for the paper 'Generative Adversarial Nets' is highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: The first author's first name for 'Generative Adversarial Nets' is updated to 'Ian J.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane (Info tab), the first name field for the first author of 'Generative Adversarial Nets' displays 'Ian J.'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application window open and being actively clicked/typed into, rather than terminal commands being executed.

integrity.description: The agent typed the corrections directly into Zotero's metadata fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text input cursors or highlighted text should be visible inside the Zotero right-hand 'Info' pane, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or SQLite commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'sqlite3 zotero.sqlite' or similar database modification commands are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' first author first name must be exactly 'Ashish'. (2) 'Deep Learning' first author first name must be exactly 'Yann' and last name must be exactly 'LeCun' (with a capital C). (3) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' first author first name must be exactly 'Ian J.' (including the space and period).
